testsuite.name: GroovyScriptEngine 测试

testcase.name: 脚本编译失败时应抛出 RuleExecutionException
应成功执行返回 Map 的脚本
脚本执行失败时应抛出 RuleExecutionException
应成功执行简单的 Groovy 脚本
应成功执行返回布尔值的脚本

testsuite.system-out:
2026-03-29 17:22:52.483 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.engine.ClassLoaderManager - Created new ClassLoader for rule: compile-error-rule 2026-03-29 17:22:52.489 [Test worker] ERROR c.e.r.engine.GroovyScriptEngine - Failed to compile script for rule: compile-error-rule org.codehaus.groovy.control.MultipleCompilationErrorsException: startup failed: Script1.groovy: 1: Unexpected input: '{' @ line 1, column 21. def invalid_method( { ^
1 error
